author: Sébastien Dubois
description: Publish your vault notes to a Ghost blog with configurable presets for tags, newsletters, and frontmatter conventions. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Sébastien Dubois
manifest.description: Publish your vault notes to a Ghost blog with configurable presets for tags, newsletters, and frontmatter conventions.
manifest.name: Ghost Publish
